subject: docs(setup): add CLAUDE.md and full documentation structure
body:
Establish AI preferences, project standards, and documentation
framework for the Sancio agreement tool. Based on the glow-props
CLAUDE.md template, adapted for this project's domain.

Created files:
- CLAUDE.md: AI preferences, principles, code standards, documentation guidelines
- docs/SESSION_NOTES.md: Session continuity summaries
- docs/TODO.md: Pending work backlog
- docs/HISTORY.md: Completed work archive
- docs/USER_ACTIONS.md: Manual intervention tracking
- docs/AI_MISTAKES.md: AI error prevention log
- docs/USER_GUIDE.md: User-facing documentation
- docs/TESTING_GUIDE.md: Manual test scenarios

Tags: documentation, setup, project-structure
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: project-setup
Semver: minor
